project_name: Dra. Carmen Valdez — commercial_health_center — La Paz, BCS
payment_instructions: Bank transfer to Oficio Taller. Bank: [CLABE — TO BE CONFIGURED IN .env]. Reference: PRJ-2026-0317-tc004-centro-salud-M1.

line_items.description: Design narrative, zone diagrams, 3D massing, material direction board, COFEPRIS facility category confirmation, infection control zoning concept
Floor plans, elevations, sections, site plan, interior design criteria, clinical standards checklist, COFEPRIS compliance checklist Phase 2, accessibility compliance matrix
Structural integration, electrical + UPS + generator, HVAC clinical design, medical gas systems (O2/air/vacuum), plumbing, fire suppression, foundation
Fully coordinated construction set, detail sheets, finish schedule, equipment rough-in drawings, technical specifications, COFEPRIS permit-ready package
Bid package preparation and distribution to minimum 3 clinical-experience contractors, bid comparison matrix, recommendation

line_items.phase: Phase 6 — Permitting (Building Permit + COFEPRIS Licencia Sanitaria)
line_items.description: Building permit application, COFEPRIS sanitary license application, COFEPRIS facility authorization package, medical gas approval, submission and correction tracking

phase_allocation_note: Architecture fee USD 216,000 allocated across phases proportionally: Ph1 20% ($43,200), Ph2 25% ($54,000), Ph3 15% ($32,400), Ph4 25% ($54,000), Ph5 10% ($21,600), Ph6 5% ($10,800). Total = $216,000.
